content:
🌟 sealed-secrets | Go
🎯 Primary Use Case: Securely managing Kubernetes Secrets in Git repositories as part of a GitOps workflow.
✨ Key Features: • One-way encryption of Kubernetes Secrets • Controller for decryption within the cluster • Safe storage of secrets in Git repositories • Kubeseal CLI tool for encryption and management • Support for secret rotation and key management
📖 Summary: Sealed Secrets is a Kubernetes controller and tool that allows for the one-way encryption of sensitive data (Secrets) before they are stored in Git. It ensures that only the controller running within the target Kubernetes cluster can decrypt these secrets, making them safe for version control.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
